etimesUS states under heavy snowfall warning: List of states that could experience up to 10 inches of snowSpring has arrived in the US, but a powerful late-season snowstorm is bringing life-threatening cold and heavy snow to many regions. Meteorologists call this "weather whiplash," a clash of polar air and storm systems. The National Weather Service warns of dangerous driving conditions and advises avoiding travel due to rapid snowfall rates and potential for impassable roads.

etimesWoman earning Rs 2.5 lakh says she was happier at Rs 15,000; the reason may surprise youA working professional's viral post reveals happiness isn't tied to income. Earning Rs 2.5 lakh monthly, she felt most content at Rs 15,000, attributing current dissatisfaction to comparison. A period of no income shifted her perspective, emphasizing purpose over paychecks. This resonates widely, with many relating to 'comparison fatigue' and valuing curiosity-driven work.

etimesBengaluru man ‘hires AI’ to find a house; internet says this is geniusA product designer in Bengaluru leveraged an AI tool called Comet to streamline his house-hunting process. The AI efficiently scanned Facebook groups for 'no brokerage' listings, filtered out spam, and calculated travel times, significantly reducing the number of properties he had to personally review. This innovative approach led him to finalize his home after only four visits.
